# SkyTrack AAOS

> Agentic Aviation Operating System: a real-time command center for fleet, MRO, crew, disruption, routing, and cargo operations.

SkyTrack AAOS is built for commercial airlines and flight schools that need a single operational pane of glass — live aircraft state, AI delay predictions, work-order triage, crew duty, and ICAO carbon accounting.

## Pages
- [Sign In](/login): Access the SkyTrack command center.
- [Aircraft Management Guide](/guide/aircraft-management): Complete guide to modern aircraft management with an AAOS.
